title: AREP Task — Arif Reality Engineering Protocol
description: The formal contract for human→agent task delegation in arifOS. This replaces prompt engineering with reality engineering. A task is a task, whether it comes from a human principal or another agent. Aligned with A2A v1.0 task lifecycle and AgenticReality existential grounding model. Coined by Muhammad Arif bin Fazil (F13 SOVEREIGN), 2026-06-04.

intent.description: The human's intent — WHAT they want, not HOW to do it. This is the only layer the human touches.

statement.description: Natural language intent declaration. e.g. 'forge all organ with deepseek integration'

success_criteria.description: Verifiable conditions that define task completion. e.g. ['all 7 organs health 200', 'deepseek key verified live', 'registry updated']

failure_modes.description: Known ways this task can fail. Agent uses these for self-verification.

principal.description: The human sovereign who owns this task. The ultimate authority in the delegation chain.

actor_id.description: F13 SOVEREIGN. All authority traces back to this identity.

ratification_mode.description: How the principal ratified this task. implicit = delegated within autonomy band. 888_HOLD = held pending human ack. explicit_ack = human explicitly approved.

sovereign_signature.description: Optional cryptographic signature from the principal. Required for GROUND_TRUTH evidence floor.

reality_constraints.description: The reality engineering layer — what must be true before, during, and after task execution.

evidence_floor.description: Minimum evidence layer required for execution. VERIFIED_STATE = live health probes must pass. GROUND_TRUTH = seal required.

condition.description: Must be true to proceed. e.g. 'organ_health == GREEN'

action_on_fail.description: What to do if condition fails.

reality_gates.description: Ordered list of conditions checked before each execution step. Like pre-flight checks on a drilling rig.

autonomy_band.description: Maximum autonomy band for this task. Agent cannot escalate beyond this band without re-delegation. GREEN = full auto. RED = human required. BLACK = forbidden.

model_identity_constraint.description: Which model passports are authorized for this task. Verified against the model registry.

allowed_providers.description: Provider keys from the model registry. e.g. ['deepseek', 'minimax', 'ilmu']

self_claim_boundary.description: F9 Anti-Hantu: model cannot claim identity beyond its passport.

reversibility.description: F1 AMANAH and F8 REVERSIBILITY constraints.

maximum_action_class.description: Highest risk action class permitted. ATOMIC requires explicit human ack.

delegation_chain.description: Ordered chain of authority from principal to executing agent. Each hop attenuates scope (Huawei governance paper, June 2026).

scope.description: Narrower than parent's scope. What this actor is authorized to do.

max_subagent_depth.description: How many more delegation hops are allowed.

task_lifecycle.description: A2A v1.0 task lifecycle mapping. Every AREP task follows this state machine.

vault_seal_hash.description: VAULT999 seal hash if artifact was sealed.

a2a_task_id.description: A2A protocol task ID for cross-agent operability.

parent_task_id.description: If this task was spawned by another agent, the parent's A2A task ID.

constitutional_binding.description: Which constitutional floors are active for this task and their current state.

active_floors.description: Floors actively enforced for this task.

telemetry.description: Operational metadata for AAA cockpit display.
